approvalSource: Steve approved FOUNDATION-KB-ACTION-REVIEW-SPRINT-001 and instructed the builder to create/scope/build FOUNDATION-KB-COMPILER-V1-001 first, with no live extraction, transcript fetch, screenshots, model calls, auth-required or paid runs, external writes, or Harlan/Fal/voice/Canva/OpenHuman feature work.
scopeSummary: Build the first Foundation-owned proposal-only KB compiler path from existing source-backed records into a quality-gated compiled KB/wiki draft contract.
constraints: No transcript fetch, screenshot capture, crawl, summarization, or model call.
No compiled page, query index, vector table, Research Inbox, atom, or backlog writes from compiled content.
